segments.text: In 1940, the Tacoma Narrows Bridge looked
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: like the future.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: It was long, slender, cheaper than the
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: original conservative design, and beautiful enough
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: to make its movement famous.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: People called it Galloping Gertie.
But the wind on collapse day was
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: not extraordinary.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: The bridge had already survived stronger autumn
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: winds.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: The hidden problem was what the bridge
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: did to the air after it started
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: moving.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: Its shallow solid plate girder deck was
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: too flexible in torsion.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: Once the roadway began to twist, the
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: motion changed the airflow, and the changed
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: airflow fed the next twist.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: Engineers were studying the motion, but the
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: design culture had not yet made dynamic
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: aerodynamic testing routine for bridges like this.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: The bridge did not just meet wind.
It entered a behavior its own design
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: made possible.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: Small causes, massive consequences.
